title: After the Osaka Hai: Hands to the Sky

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin enjoys the Osaka Hai to her heart's
content, unburdened by all that she had tried to
carry alone as the older sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No longer shackled by the feeling that she's being
selfish by running, she crosses the finish line with
a glowing smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the race, she feels an even stronger
resolve to live up to the dreams of the people
supporting her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Ines tells me she's eyeing the Takarazuka
Kinen, a race which fields the most popular
runners, I give her my full support without
hesitation.
